hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:];&|(])(npm|npx)([[:space:];&|)]|$)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Do not use npm or npx. Use pnpm instead of npm, and pnpx instead of npx."}}'; fi
